subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested Himself from the Most Exalted Horizon and hath spoken forth the Supreme Word, and when It was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر نفسه من الافق الاعلی و نطق بالکلمه العلیا و اذا ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
